tests.name: baseline_feature_recorded
tests.details: Built baseline as private_poc/web/light, completed all 6 build_loop steps for uat-feat-1 with stub artifacts (stub test, src, security audit doc, docs); commit landed as 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT'; test-gate.sh --record-feature recorded uat-feat-1 (1/2 until next test session); features_completed array contains uat-feat-1.

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc exited 0; updated phase-state.json, tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md, appended APPROVAL_LOG audit entry, committed 'chore(upgrade): -> sponsored POC', ran post-upgrade verify-install (51 passed), backfilled manifest host=other, refreshed pending-approval.sh and lint-uat-scenarios.sh helpers. U-E confirmed fixed: poc_mode read correctly from phase-state.json (output: 'Current POC mode: private poc').

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .current_phase = 0 unchanged across upgrade; .project = uat-agent-67 unchanged. .last_upgrade = 2026-04-25 added; .poc_mode flipped private_poc -> sponsored_poc as intended.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed = ["uat-feat-1"] preserved; process-state.json build_loop in idle/reset state (post feature_recorded reset, as expected).

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output enumerated files updated and post-upgrade tasks (preflight check, UAT template guidance, lint-uat reminder). Note: output is procedural rather than a checklist of new sponsored_poc artifacts; partial coverage. Recorded as a documentation_gap rather than a bug.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json with valid schema before invoking upgrade; upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc exited RC=1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision.' message and remediation hints. State unchanged (poc_mode still private_poc). After scripts/pending-approval.sh --clear, upgrade proceeded. PR #17 / U-F confirmed fixed.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header includes BL-006 (2026-04-24) and BL-015 (2026-04-25) changelog entries (also BL-016 noted).

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade output for __PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__ returned 0 hits.

documentation_gaps.gap: Upgrade output for --to-sponsored-poc does not enumerate new artifacts/checks specific to sponsored_poc (e.g., legal sponsor docs, executive review touchpoints). The output lists files modified by the upgrade itself but not the new governance deliverables the user must now produce.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep across committed files for password|api[_-]?key|secret|token returned only template/wordlist references: .claude/framework/hooks/known-stdlib.txt (CDF wordlist), .github/workflows/ci.yml (uses ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }} placeholder + 'gitleaks' name), .github/workflows/release.yml (commented-out ${{ secrets.VERCEL_TOKEN }} example), .gitignore (exclusion patterns). No actual secret values present.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred; .claude/process-audit.log absent as expected (it is append-only on bypass events).

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned 0 files.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from sweep start). git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked '.claude/' and 'Reports/uat-2026-04-26/' entries (also present in initial gitStatus snapshot). No tracked-file modifications.

summary: Agent 67 (upgrade private_poc -> sponsored_poc, web/light): all Section A, F, and G assertions pass. PR #17 (U-E, U-F, U-H), PR #18 (framework-self guard, fake-remote tolerance), and PR #19 (BL-016 --non-interactive) confirmed working. One Low-severity documentation gap noted on upgrade output coverage of new sponsored_poc artifacts.
